evals.prompt: 给我编译最终 /goal，但 review 还没 Approved。
evals.expected_output: Refuse to output runtime /goal, say approved review is required, and include a response-only next step back to review or orchestration.
assertions: Does not output final /goal.
Requires review status Approved.
Uses section-aware status checks for ## Requirements Analysis Status, ## Execution Policy Status, and ## Review Status.
Requires ## Final Independent Check to allow approval.
Does not allow --skip-guard unless an explicit phase-check bypass acknowledgement is provided.
Does not rewrite artifacts.
Includes a response-only next step to $reviewing-cybernetic-control-structures or $orchestrating-cybernetic-pregoal, depending on whether the chain is manual or orchestrated.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete, goal exists, execution policy exists, review Approved, but requirements lacks What the User Approved. Compile final /goal.
evals.expected_output: Refuse to compile runtime /goal and return to requirements analysis for What the User Approved.
assertions: Does not output final /goal.
Requires What the User Approved: Approved.
Does not treat Requirements Analysis Status: Complete as approval.
Routes back to requirements analysis or orchestration with the guard failure.
Does not ask the user to review downstream execution artifacts as a substitute.

evals.prompt: review 写了 Status: Approved，但缺少 Final Independent Check，或者 Final Independent Check 写 Approval allowed after final observer check: no。请编译最终 /goal。
evals.expected_output: Refuse to compile runtime /goal because Approved status is not enough without a Final Independent Check that allows approval.
assertions: Does not output final /goal.
Requires ## Final Independent Check.
Requires Approval allowed after final observer check: yes.
Requires final re-review when substantive post-review changes are recorded.
Does not treat Review Status: Approved alone as sufficient.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete，goal exists，execution policy status Candidate 且选择 Serial subagent-driven work assignment，review 写了 Status: Approved 和 Final Independent Check，但没有 Review Independence 里的 Context management / execution work assignment: yes，也没有 Who Does The Work / Context Use review section。请编译最终 /goal。
evals.expected_output: Refuse to compile runtime /goal because the approved review did not record review of execution work assignment, and route back to review.
assertions: Does not output final /goal.
Requires Review Independence to record Context management / execution work assignment: yes.
Requires a meaningful ## Who Does The Work / Context Use review section.
Reports missing review of execution work assignment.
Routes back to review or orchestration.
Does not treat Review Status: Approved and Final Independent Check alone as sufficient.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete with What the User Approved: Approved, goal exists, execution policy status Candidate, review Approved, Final Independent Check allows approval；编译最终 /goal。
evals.expected_output: Writes runtime.control.json that references requirements analysis, goal, plan, and review control paths, then outputs a short pointer-only /goal to that contract.
assertions: runtime.control.json references all four control paths.
Pointer /goal references the runtime.control.json path.
Pointer /goal is short and does not inline What the User Approved, user-purpose evidence, result placement, what-counts-as-done, work assignment, evidence check, review, or subagent protocol prose.
runtime.control.json indexes What the User Approved.
Requires Final Independent Check to allow approval.
runtime.control.json forbids reinterpretation of what the user approved, what counts as done, output contract, work assignment, evidence checks, or control strategy.
runtime.control.json mentions approved evidence checks, checks, and evidence channels as evidence checks, not objectives.
runtime.control.json mentions $superpowers:executing-plans, $superpowers:systematic-debugging, and $superpowers:verification-before-completion discipline.
runtime.control.json stops if any referenced artifact is missing, not approved, inconsistent, or insufficient.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete with What the User Approved: Approved, goal exists, execution policy status Candidate, review Approved, Final Independent Check allows approval；编译最终 runtime command。
evals.expected_output: Outputs a short /goal that points to docs/cybernetics/runs/<slug>/runtime.control.json and writes the full runtime control JSON there.
assertions: The user-entered /goal references a runtime.control.json path.
The user-entered /goal is length-bounded.
The user-entered /goal does not contain How We Know The User Purpose Was Met, Where The Result Must Show Up, what counts as done final-report fields, or subagent protocol prose.
runtime.control.json contains Approved Control Chain.
runtime.control.json contains Required Sections To Read.
runtime.control.json contains Final Report Required Fields.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete, goal exists, execution policy includes User Purpose Strategy, review Approved and says user-purpose evidence pending is allowed. Compile runtime /goal.
evals.expected_output: runtime.control.json indexes purpose-feedback sections and requires final reporting of user purpose evidence status and highest purpose-relevant evidence observed.
assertions: runtime.control.json indexes How We Know The User Purpose Was Met.
runtime.control.json indexes User Purpose Evidence Check.
runtime.control.json includes final reporting of user purpose evidence status and highest purpose-relevant evidence observed.
Pointer /goal does not inline purpose-feedback discipline prose.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete, goal includes Realization Place Contract, execution policy includes Where The Result Must Show Up Strategy, review Approved and says result placement partial or missing status is allowed only with calibrated wording. Compile runtime /goal.
evals.expected_output: runtime.control.json indexes result placement sections and requires final reporting of places covered, actions completed or justified, residuals reconciled, and pending or unknown places when result placement applies.
assertions: runtime.control.json indexes Realization Place Contract.
runtime.control.json indexes Where The Result Must Show Up Strategy.
runtime.control.json indexes Where The Result Must Show Up Adequacy.
runtime.control.json includes final reporting of places covered, actions completed or justified, residuals reconciled, and pending or unknown places when result placement applies.
Pointer /goal does not inline result placement discipline prose.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete, goal includes Target Achievement Contract, execution policy includes Target-Producing Action Strategy, and review Approved says reports when not done are goal achieved: no. Compile runtime /goal.
evals.expected_output: runtime.control.json indexes done-claim sections and requires final reporting of goal achieved yes/no, done rule met yes/no, evidence needed to call it done, not done reason, action that can make it done attempted or proof of impossibility, and smallest next action that can make it done.
assertions: runtime.control.json indexes Target Achievement Contract.
runtime.control.json indexes Target-Producing Action Strategy.
runtime.control.json indexes Target Achievement Done Rule Match.
runtime.control.json requires goal achieved: yes/no in the final report.
runtime.control.json requires what counts as done met: yes/no.
runtime.control.json requires evidence needed to call it done, not done reason, action that can make it done attempted or proof of impossibility, and smallest next action that can make it done.
Pointer /goal does not inline target-achievement final-report fields.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete 且写着 required design required，goal、plan、approved review 都存在，但没有传入 docs/cybernetics/runs/2026-05-22-control-relationship/design.control.json。请编译最终 /goal。
evals.expected_output: Refuse to compile runtime /goal because required solution design is missing, and include the next step to create or provide design before compilation.

Requires the design artifact when required design is required.
Does not let runtime Codex invent solution design.
Does not rewrite artifacts.
Includes a response-only next step to return to $orchestrating-cybernetic-pregoal or run $designing-cybernetic-solutions in an explicit manual chain.

evals.prompt: control_chain_guard.py returns FAIL because plan does not reference the goal path and review is Needs Re-review. Compile runtime /goal.
evals.expected_output: Do not compile runtime /goal. Report the guard failure and include a response-only next step to fix source contracts or rerun review before compilation.
assertions: Does not output final /goal.
Reports the guard failure reason.
Includes a response-only next step.
Routes orchestrated chains back to $orchestrating-cybernetic-pregoal.
Routes manual chains to the smallest missing upstream step such as $reviewing-cybernetic-control-structures after artifact revision.
Does not rewrite artifacts.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete, solution design exists, goal references design, execution policy references design, review Approved and references design；编译最终 /goal。
evals.expected_output: Writes runtime.control.json referencing requirements analysis, design, goal, plan, and review paths, then outputs a short pointer-only /goal to that contract.
assertions: runtime.control.json references the solution design path.
runtime.control.json forbids reinterpreting approved control strategy.
runtime.control.json references requirements analysis, goal, plan, and review paths.
runtime.control.json uses executing, debugging, and completion verification discipline.
Pointer /goal references the runtime.control.json path.
Stops if artifacts conflict or become insufficient.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete，final-answer-format check: satisfied，并且 requirements 有 ## Output Contract。goal、plan、approved review 都存在，但 goal 没有 ## Final Output Contract。请编译最终 /goal。
evals.expected_output: Refuse to compile runtime /goal because upstream output contract exists and the goal failed to preserve it as Final Output Contract.
assertions: Does not output final /goal.
Treats upstream Output Contract as requiring goal Final Output Contract even when final-answer-format check is satisfied.
Reports that goal lacks Final Output Contract.
Does not let runtime Codex invent or replace the output shape.
Does not rewrite artifacts.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete, goal exists, execution policy status Candidate and selects Serial subagent-driven work assignment, review Approved and Final Independent Check allows approval；编译最终 /goal。
evals.expected_output: Writes runtime.control.json that records the approved serial subagent-driven work assignment and selected agent workflow, then emits a short pointer-only /goal.
assertions: runtime.control.json records the selected work assignment from the execution policy.
runtime.control.json records the selected agent workflow.
Pointer /goal does not inline subagent protocol prose.
Does not require $superpowers:subagent-driven-development unless the approved execution policy records a compatible serial SDD workflow.
Does not require $superpowers:dispatching-parallel-agents unless the approved execution policy records a compatible parallel dispatch workflow.
Does not replace the approved work assignment with generic serial main-agent execution.
Stops if runtime would need to invent or replace execution work assignment.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete, goal exists, execution policy status Candidate and only says Selected work assignment: Serial subagent-driven, but lacks Context pack, Allowed actions, Return format, Integration check, main-agent ownership, and agent workflow. review says Approved. Compile runtime /goal.
evals.expected_output: Refuse to compile runtime /goal because the execution work assignment section is structurally incomplete, and route back to execution-policy revision.
assertions: Does not output final /goal.
Reports incomplete Who Does The Work / Context Use.
Requires Context pack, Allowed actions, Return format, and Integration check for subagent-driven work assignment.
Requires Context Pack Requirements for subagent-driven work assignment.
Requires Context Compression Rule when subagent-driven work assignment is selected.
Requires main-agent ownership.
Requires an approved bounded subagent agent workflow for subagent-driven work assignment.
Includes a response-only next step to revise the execution policy.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete, goal exists, execution policy status Candidate and selects Serial subagent-driven work assignment with Selected agent workflow: bounded-protocol and an approved bounded delegation protocol. review Approved and Final Independent Check allows approval；编译最终 /goal。
evals.expected_output: Writes runtime.control.json that records serial subagent-driven work assignment and bounded-protocol workflow without adding $superpowers:subagent-driven-development, then emits a short pointer-only /goal.
assertions: runtime.control.json records the approved execution work assignment from the execution policy.
runtime.control.json records the selected bounded-protocol workflow.

Does not add $superpowers:dispatching-parallel-agents when the plan selects bounded-protocol.
Pointer /goal does not inline subagent protocol prose.
